ddls:
CREATE TABLE "funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the mutual fund */,
  "fund_type" TEXT /* Type of the fund (e.g., Equity, Bond) */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the fund was launched */,
  "asset_class" TEXT /* Asset class of the fund (e.g., Stocks, Bonds, Cash) */,
  "investment_strategy" TEXT /* Investment strategy of the fund */,
  "isin" TEXT /* ISIN number of the fund */,
  "fund_manager" TEXT /* Name of the fund manager */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund class */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fund the class belongs to */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund class (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the fund class */,
  "minimum_investment" REAL /* Minimum investment required for the class */,
  "management_fee" REAL /* Management fee for the class */,
  "inception_date" TEXT /* Date the class was created */,
  "expense_ratio" REAL /* Expense ratio of the class */,
  "minimum_holding_period" INTEGER /* Minimum holding period for the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_classes_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nav_history" (
  "nav_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NAV record */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fund class the NAV data belongs to */,
  "nav_per_share" REAL /* NAV per share on the given date */,
  "prev_nav_per_share" REAL /* Previous NAV per share */,
  "nav_change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in NAV from the previous date */,
  "nav_date" TEXT /* Date of the NAV data */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date the NAV was calculated */,
  "valuation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the NAV */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nav_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nav_history_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES fund_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fund manager, analyst, investor) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., admin, read-only) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_fund_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fund */,
  "access_granted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if access is granted */,
  "grant_date" TEXT /* Date the user was granted access */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the user's access expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_fund_access_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_fund_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fund the alert is for */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fund class the alert is for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., performance drop, significant gain) */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., acknowledged, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES fund_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fund the report is for */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annual) */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* Period covered by the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data associated with the report (e.g., JSON, CSV) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_performance_reports_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fund the holding belongs to */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security (e.g., stock, bond) held by the fund */,
  "holding_type" TEXT /* Type of the holding (e.g., equity, bond) */,
  "holding_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the holding */,
  "holding_value" REAL /* Value of the holding */,
  "holding_date" TEXT /* Date of the holding data */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry associated with the holding */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector associated with the holding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_holdings_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)
